title: Neste Started Producing Sustainable Sviation Fuel (SAF) at its Renewables Rrefinery in Rotterdam, Netherlands
content: Neste, the worldâ€™s leading producer of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), has started producing SAF at its renewable products refinery in Rotterdam, the Netherlands. The refinery has been modified to enable Neste to produce up to 500,000 tons of SAF per annum. As a result, Nesteâ€™s global SAF production capability has increased to 1.5 million tons (around 1.875 billion liters) per annum.
author: Analysts Account
